query_normalized: predicting adsorption isotherm parameters from molecular features chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) because it directly addresses the core mechanism of the user's question by proposing a model to fit adsorption isotherm data and extract the specific "parameters" (equilibrium constants, thermodynamic properties) that the user aims to predict, even though it focuses on the fitting methodology rather than the machine learning prediction from molecular features.
